title: preptanthe labrosa
intro: Preptanthe labrosa, also known as the hairy mountain mint, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Preptanthe labrosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Preptanthe labrosa are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
